title: DogsPack
description: A modpack made by hackerdogs that focuses on optimizations, tools, and gameplay. Regularly updated and built for any versions I play on for Fabric.
body:
# DogsPack
## ABOUT:

This is a modpack I made on my own for Fabric versions that I use in order to play the game and do stuff I like in Minecraft without lag and stuff.

I just add mods depending on my vibe so don't get annoyed.

**__You are free to modify this, but if you publish it please mention my Discord__ username `confidentialpeacock`**

## CORE MODS (the ones I really like):
- Mod Menu
- e4mc
- fullbrightnesstoggle
- Sodium
- Iris
- IAS
- JEI
- Controlling
- ViaFabricPlus
- Lithium
- Ferritecore
- Inventory HUD
- Shulker tooltip
- Freecam
- Reese
- All HUD Bars
- OfflineLAN

## Credits:
1. Mod Devs
2. Me
3. All Mod Dev teams
4. Riznor
5. Angkan

## Planning:
- Good mods that don't weigh much on old PCs to be added
- Offline mode stuff
- Newer versions
- Stability
- More optimizations

## Original Link:
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1hIfUOx6tiOEkDJHPZrmLaR3C3n8HWO-S?usp=sharing

**__If you have any suggestions contact me via discord or telegram on username `confidentialpeacock` and I will see.__**
